title: uragoga cordifolia
intro: Uragoga cordifolia is a plant species belonging to the family Annonaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Uragoga cordifolia can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, although its preparation and usage may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
